title: Rain Falls on Alabasta
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on the rain returns to alabasta. With Crocodile defeated and the truth exposed, the battlefield finally begins to quiet as rain and exhaustion wash over the kingdom.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Rain Returns to Alabasta sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Tashigi, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: The whole place is falling apart!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: You really think it's in there!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Oh no, it's the B.W. again!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: We ended up calling the enemies too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I wonder if they found the place!?

summary: With Crocodile defeated and the truth exposed, the battlefield finally begins to quiet as rain and exhaustion wash over the kingdom.
